mapper.select: SELECT l.*, lm.role, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ledger_members WHERE ledger_id = l.id) as member_count, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM records WHERE ledger_id = l.id) as total_amount FROM ledgers l JOIN ledger_members lm ON l.id = lm.ledger_id WHERE lm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar_url, lm.role, lm.joined_at FROM ledger_members lm JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id WHERE lm.ledger_id = #{ledgerId}
